items.line_en: For most managers, the pathway is the same, they go to college and they study hard,

coach.say: For most managers, the pathway is the same, they go to college and they study hard,
coach.hint: Chunk it: For most managers, / the pathway is the same, / they go to college and they study hard,

items.line_en: they get a job and they work hard and they rise through the ranks and then they're promoted

coach.say: they get a job and they work hard and they rise through the ranks and then they're promoted
coach.hint: Chunk it: they get a job and they work hard and they rise through the ranks and / then they're promoted

items.line_en: to a manager and then they're pretty much left to their own devices to figure out management

coach.say: to a manager and then they're pretty much left to their own devices to figure out management
coach.hint: Chunk it: to a manager and / then they're pretty much left to their own devices to figure out management

items.line_en: on the fly.

coach.say: on the fly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: on the fly.

items.line_en: They don't get any tools, they rarely get training and they get no support to learn how

coach.say: They don't get any tools, they rarely get training and they get no support to learn how
coach.hint: Chunk it: They don't get any tools, / they rarely get training and they get no support to learn how

items.line_en: to be a great manager.

coach.say: to be a great manager.
coach.hint: Chunk it: to be a great manager.

items.line_en: The biggest challenge for managers is I try to understand the difference and the importance

coach.say: The biggest challenge for managers is I try to understand the difference and the importance
coach.hint: Chunk it: The biggest challenge for managers is I try to understand the difference and / the importance

items.line_en: and the difference between being busy, doing lots and lots of things and getting the right

coach.hint: Chunk it: and the difference between being busy, / doing lots and lots of things and getting the right

items.line_en: things done well, having activity driven from strategic objectives.

coach.say: things done well, having activity driven from strategic objectives.
coach.hint: Chunk it: things done well, / having activity driven from strategic objectives.

items.line_en: how to manage.

coach.hint: Chunk it: how to manage.

coach.hint: Chunk it: They're simply a place where they write information, / it's not a living, / breeding process,

items.line_en: it's not something that makes them better managers.

coach.hint: Chunk it: it's not something that makes them better managers.

coach.hint: Chunk it: We built a performance collaboration solution which is a way for managers and / their staff

items.line_en: to create plans together to manage their progress towards key objectives and to manage

items.line_en: feedback and learn how to deliver that well.
